# TechTree

TechTree is a source-backed human technology dependency graph for AI and human consumption. It supports evidence-aware exploration and stable public page URLs.

Primary links:

- Demo: https://pushme.site/techtree/demo.html
- Graph: https://pushme.site/techtree/
- Sorted: https://pushme.site/techtree/sorted.html
- Technology entrypoint pattern: `https://pushme.site/techtree/tech/<id>.html` (example: `https://pushme.site/techtree/tech/crispr_gene_editing.html`)
- Field entrypoint pattern: `https://pushme.site/techtree/fields/<slug>.html`
- Live GitHub repository: https://github.com/yodakohl/techtree
- Data model: https://github.com/yodakohl/techtree/blob/main/data
- Quality snapshot: https://github.com/yodakohl/techtree/blob/main/docs/QUALITY_SNAPSHOT.md
- Total technology pages: 1658
- Total field pages: 18

Current quality metrics (from data/quality-snapshot.json):
- Technologies: 1,658
- Source-checked nodes: 1,320 / 1,658 (79.6%)
- Source-checked nodes with non-placeholder dates: 1,320 / 1,320 (100.0%)
- Source-checked nodes with placeholder dates: 0 / 1,320 (0.0%)
- Source-checked nodes with primary/review/textbook/official sources: 1,155 / 1,320 (87.5%)
- Source-checked nodes using only weak/generic sources: 0 / 1,320 (0.0%)
- Nodes with node-level sources: 1,616 / 1,658 (97.5%)
- Dependency edges with edge-level sources: 4,081 / 5,330 (76.6%)
- Era-default placeholder dates: 250 / 1,658 (15.1%)

Example technology pages:
- CRISPR/Cas9: https://pushme.site/techtree/tech/crispr_gene_editing.html
- RAG: https://pushme.site/techtree/tech/retrieval_augmented_generation.html
- EUV lithography: https://pushme.site/techtree/tech/euv_lithography.html
- Grid-scale battery storage: https://pushme.site/techtree/tech/grid_scale_battery_storage.html

Representative field pages:
- Agriculture & Food Systems: https://pushme.site/techtree/fields/agriculture-food-systems.html
- Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning: https://pushme.site/techtree/fields/artificial-intelligence-machine-learning.html
- Civil Engineering & Built Environment: https://pushme.site/techtree/fields/civil-engineering-built-environment.html
- Climate & Environmental Systems: https://pushme.site/techtree/fields/climate-environmental-systems.html
- Cybersecurity & Cryptography: https://pushme.site/techtree/fields/cybersecurity-cryptography.html
- Energy Systems & Grid: https://pushme.site/techtree/fields/energy-systems-grid.html
- Finance & Markets: https://pushme.site/techtree/fields/finance-markets.html
- Genome Editing / CRISPR-Cas: https://pushme.site/techtree/fields/genome-editing-crispr-cas.html
